Class CassandraVectorStoreProperties

java.lang.Object
org.springframework.ai.vectorstore.properties.CommonVectorStoreProperties
org.springframework.ai.vectorstore.cassandra.autoconfigure.CassandraVectorStoreProperties
@ConfigurationProperties("spring.ai.vectorstore.cassandra") public class CassandraVectorStoreProperties extends CommonVectorStoreProperties
Configuration properties for Cassandra Vector Store.
Since:
1.0.0
Author:
Mick Semb Wever
